result.summary: Found one major layout issue where floating navigation elements overlap and obscure readable text content.

issues.description: The 'SCROLL DOWN' element directly overlaps and obscures the legal disclaimer/fine print text at the bottom of the page, making it unreadable.
issues.suggestion: Adjust the vertical spacing, add padding at the bottom of the content container, or adjust the z-index and positioning of the floating banner to prevent text overlap.
